column1: 1 Los Angeles-Inland Empire and San Francisco-San Jose were combined for the circuity analysis
2 Circuity is from a sample of OD points with network distance matched to average commute distance
Network Speed (congested), Network Speed (freeflow), Population: TTI complete data 1982-2007 (calculated from 2001 values only), FHWA data on highway usage in 2001
Circuity: Networks are Census Tiger 2008 county-level shapefiles merged together, commute distances are from 2001 NHTS
Employment: 2001 MSA Business Patterns (NAICS - from Censtats)
